focus_intent: Iteration 13: ENCODING-vs-TRIAD answered definitively. K=4 ANGLE on the same multi-agent rank-1 QBC triad gives only 3.4pp advantage (real 0.5026 vs classical 0.5367) — vs K=4 ZZ-FM r=1's verified 34.1pp on identical triad. Encoding does 10× more work than triad selection. Production recipe requires BOTH QBC triad AND ZZ-FM r=1 encoding. Bonus: K=4 ANGLE depth-8 noise is essentially zero on WK_C180 (real 0.5026 vs sim 0.5006 = 0.002pp Δ). Action items doc updated. Budget 43.625s of 60s.
